ham.subject: Out of Office: [Colleague Name]
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from July 20th to July 24th. I will not have access to email during this period.

For urgent matters, please contact Jane Doe at jane.doe@example.com.

Thank you,
[Colleague Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #12345 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

This is IT Helpdesk. We have detected an unusual activity on your account. To secure your data, please verify your account by clicking <URL> within the next 24 hours.

Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk Team
